svg.title: Appendix C hero: 10 capstone scenarios
svg.desc: Ten numbered scenario tiles arranged in a grid, escalating in complexity from Scenario 1 (mid-market consolidation) to Scenario 10 (senior architect lock-in defense), each tile showing the scenario number, a short title, and a difficulty band that grows more intense from left to right and top to bottom. Mono path top-left. Purple appendix accent.
svg.text: read · write your reasoning · compare · re-read · repeat
